hero.prompt: lighthouse on cliff, golden hour, cinematic, 16:9

A cinematic wide-angle landscape photograph of a weathered stone lighthouse perched on a dramatic volcanic cliff at golden hour, ocean mist rolling across black jagged rocks, warm backlighting creating long shadows, shot on 35mm film with natural film grain, shallow depth of field, raw physical texture on the lighthouse walls, 16:9 aspect ratio

A cinematic wide-angle landscape photograph of a weathered stone lighthouse perched on a dramatic volcanic cliff at golden hour, ocean mist rolling across black jagged rocks, warm backlighting, shot on 35mm film, natural film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

A professional close-up portrait of a pristine white rabbit sitting in a lush mossy forest clearing, soft volumetric morning light filtering through ancient oak trees, dewdrops on its whiskers, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, natural fur texture with individual hair detail, raw physical imperfections, shot on medium format film, gentle bokeh background
[EDIT] Add falling snow to this scene, make the ground covered in fresh white snow, add frost to the leaves, keep the rabbit exactly the same

[EDIT] Put a colorful cone-shaped birthday party hat on the rabbit's head, the hat should be bright red and blue with polka dots, with a small pom-pom on top and an elastic string under the chin. Keep everything else in the image exactly the same.
A sleek black sports car parked on a rain-soaked Tokyo street at night, neon reflections in puddles, cinematic wide angle, 35mm lens, Blade Runner atmosphere, 16:9
